visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: dimension density, dimension lanes, title/notes placement, and visual balance remain different.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The expected views are present, but the generated layout is still visually dominated by right-side dimensions and a diagonal cross-region dimension line.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The drawing still has too many visible DisplayDims compared with the reference and keeps a dense right-side/top-view stack.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text and leaders remain clustered around the top/right region, and the long diagonal/cross-region dimension makes the sheet difficult to read.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The title/data text area is still larger and differently placed than the compact reference title area.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference manufacturing note block.

findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/e2059740eb5b.
The previous lane fix did not eliminate the far-right callout stack in the actual generated drawing; dimension_arrange.json still reports right_callout lanes.
DisplayDim lifecycle also remains non-passing due display_dim_lifecycle_count_regression.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.
entries.required_correction: Fix the actual dimension-arrange path used by the generator so top-view reference dimensions cannot be assigned to far-right callout lanes, then reduce final real DisplayDim count toward the 12 reference targets without losing coverage before another locked 006-only CAD rerun.
